title.en: Agentic orchestration: Enterprise AI organizations have a deployment problem, not a platform problem — and most are calling chatbots agents
title.zh: 代理编排：企业人工智能组织面临的是部署问题，而不是平台问题——而且大多数都在调用聊天机器人代理

summary.en: Across 101 enterprises, agent orchestration is consolidating onto model-provider platforms — Anthropic’s Claude leads by a wide margin — chosen for the gravity of the underlying m…
summary.zh: 在 101 家企业中，代理编排正在整合到模型提供商平台上——Anthropic 的 Claude 遥遥领先——选择该平台是为了考虑底层市场的重要性……

title.en: xAI sues a man for using Grok to generate CSAM ‘deepfakes’
title.zh: xAI 起诉一名男子使用 Grok 生成 CSAM“deepfakes”

summary.en: The Elon Musk-owned xAI is suing a South Carolina man who allegedly used the company's Grok AI chatbot to generate child sexual abuse material (CSAM). In a lawsuit reported earlie…
summary.zh: 埃隆·马斯克 (Elon Musk) 旗下的 xAI 正在起诉一名南卡罗来纳州男子，该男子涉嫌使用该公司的 Grok AI 聊天机器人生成儿童性虐待材料 (CSAM)。在早些时候报道的诉讼中……

title.en: Soofi Consortium Releases Soofi S 30B-A3B: An Open Hybrid Mamba-Transformer MoE Foundation Model For German And English
title.zh: Soofi 联盟发布 Soofi S 30B-A3B：适用于德语和英语的开放式混合 Mamba-Transformer 教育部基础模型

summary.en: Soofi S 30B-A3B is an open Mamba-Transformer MoE model activating 3.2B of 31.6B parameters for German and English The post Soofi Consortium Releases Soofi S 30B-A3B: An Open Hybri…
summary.zh: Soofi S 30B-A3B 是一个开放的 Mamba-Transformer MoE 模型，激活德语和英语的 31.6B 参数中的 3.2B Soofi 联盟发布 Soofi S 30B-A3B：开放式混合…

title.en: Amid hardware legal battle, OpenAI releases a $230 keyboard for Codex
title.zh: 在硬件法律战中，OpenAI 为 Codex 发布了售价 230 美元的键盘

summary.en: OpenAI, which is in the middle of a legal battle with Apple over hardware trade theft allegations, just released a light-up keyboard designed to be paired with its agentic coding…
summary.zh: OpenAI 正因硬件贸易盗窃指控与苹果公司打官司，它刚刚发布了一款发光键盘，旨在与其代理编码相匹配……

title.en: Meet GPT-Red: an LLM super-hacker OpenAI built to make its models safer
title.zh: 认识一下 GPT-Red：LLM 超级黑客 OpenAI，旨在使其模型更安全

summary.en: OpenAI has built an LLM super-hacker called GPT-Red that it uses as a sparring partner to help its other models boost their defenses against cyberattacks. Last week the company re…
summary.zh: OpenAI 构建了一个名为 GPT-Red 的 LLM 超级黑客，将其用作陪练伙伴，帮助其其他模型增强对网络攻击的防御能力。上周该公司重新…

title.en: The US is advancing AI safety through state and federal action
title.zh: 美国正在通过州和联邦行动推进人工智能安全

summary.en: OpenAI outlines a “reverse federalism” approach to AI governance, where state laws help build a national framework for safe, democratic AI.
summary.zh: OpenAI 概述了人工智能治理的“反向联邦制”方法，其中州法律帮助建立安全、民主人工智能的国家框架。

title.en: Optimal Adaptive Market Making: A Theoretical Framework for High-Yield Liquidity Provision in Perpetual Futures Markets
title.zh: 最优自适应做市：永续期货市场高收益流动性供给的理论框架

summary.en: arXiv:2607.11888v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: We develop a rigorous theoretical framework for optimal market making in perpetual futures markets with zero maker fees. We model t…
summary.zh: arXiv:2607.11888v1 公告类型：新 摘要：我们开发了一个严格的理论框架，用于零挂单费的永续期货市场中的最优做市。我们为…建模

title.en: Now, defenders are embracing the prompt injection, too
title.zh: 现在，防御者也开始接受即时注入

summary.en: "Context bombing" tricks hacking agents into shutting down before they can do harm.
summary.zh: “上下文轰炸”会诱骗黑客代理在造成伤害之前将其关闭。

title.en: Empowering India’s next generation of innovators with ATL Saathi
title.zh: 通过 ATL Saathi 为印度下一代创新者提供支持

summary.en: Google and AIM launched ATL Saathi, a Gemini-powered AI tool empowering Indian educators in robotics labs.
summary.zh: Google 和 AIM 推出了 ATL Saathi，这是一款由 Gemini 驱动的人工智能工具，为印度机器人实验室的教育工作者提供支持。

title.en: Google just redesigned the search box for the first time in 25 years — here’s why it matters more than you think.
title.zh: Google 25 年来首次重新设计了搜索框——这就是为什么它比你想象的更重要。

summary.en: For a quarter century, the Google search box has been one of the most recognizable interfaces in computing: a thin white rectangle, a blinking cursor, a few typed words, and a lis…
summary.zh: 四分之一个世纪以来，谷歌搜索框一直是计算领域最知名的界面之一：一个细长的白色矩形、一个闪烁的光标、几个键入的单词和一个列表……
